title: The RealReal Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: The RealReal reported Q4 2024 revenue of $164 million, up 14% year-over-year, a record high for the company. Full year 2024 GMV and total revenue increased 6% and 9% respectively, compared to the full year for 2023. In 2024 the company made a revenue of $0.60 billion USD, an increase over the revenue in the year 2023 that were of $0.54 billion USD. 2024 net loss of $134 million improved $34 million year-over-year, resulting in positive $9 million of adjusted EBITDA. 2024 operating cash flow of positive $27 million, increased $88 million year-over-year, resulting in positive free cash flow for the year. Full year 2024 adjusted EBITDA improved to positive $9 million, a significant milestone. The company demonstrated substantial operational improvements in 2024, reaching positive adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow while also growing revenue and achieving record Q4 revenue. Management emphasized the progress on supply unlocking initiatives, enhanced customer experience, and the initial deployment of Athena AI system for intake process automation.
